mapper.sql: SELECT cr.id, cr.register_id, cr.medical_technology_id, cr.check_info, cr.check_position, cr.check_remark, cr.check_state, cr.check_result, cr.check_time, cr.creation_time, cr.check_employee_id, cr.inputcheck_employee_id, r.case_number, r.real_name AS patient_name, mt.tech_name, mt.tech_code, mt.ai_category_code FROM check_request cr INNER JOIN register r ON r.id = cr.register_id INNER JOIN medical_technology mt ON mt.id = cr.medical_technology_id
mapper.select:
WHERE cr.register_id = #{registerId}
ORDER BY cr.creation_time DESC, cr.id DESC

WHERE cr.check_state = #{checkState}
ORDER BY cr.creation_time ASC, cr.id ASC

WHERE cr.check_state = '待检查'
ORDER BY cr.creation_time ASC, cr.id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE check_request SET check_state = #{checkState} WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE check_request SET check_result = #{checkResult}, check_state = #{checkState}, check_time = #{checkTime}, check_remark = #{checkRemark}, inputcheck_employee_id = #{inputcheckEmployeeId} WHERE id = #{id}
